description: Compile billiards / pool / cue-ball prompts into active-striker and passive-target rigid-body cases with contact-driven target motion.
physical_assumptions: Only active striker bodies may have initial velocity or impulse.
Passive targets start with zero linear and angular velocity.
Passive target motion must be explained by contact propagation.
Initial sphere colliders must not overlap.
verifier_rules: Passive pre-contact velocity and displacement <= epsilon.
At least one active-to-passive contact exists.
Post-contact passive motion is allowed only after contact.
repair_suggestions: Increase initial spacing or reduce collider radius.
Enable collision events and contact capture.
Do not keyframe target motion before first contact.
